questions.question: Run a one-liner curl loop to test all HTTP methods supported by the DUT web server.
questions.help_text:
Enter the following command in the terminal:
for method in GET POST PUT DELETE HEAD OPTIONS TRACE TRACK PATCH CONNECT; do echo -e "
====== Testing $method ======"; curl -k -X $method https://192.168.1.2/ -i; done
questions.error_message: Failed to execute the curl one-liner or unable to detect supported HTTP methods.

questions.question: Add the FortiAP to Burp Suite's Target > Scope and browse the DUT's web interface with Burp capturing traffic.
questions.help_text: In Burp Suite, go to Target > Scope and add DUT IP Address. Then, open a browser configured to use Burp as a proxy and navigate through all pages of the DUT web interface to allow Burp to capture traffic.
